title.en: Manufacturing: paint-booth exhaust heat to 70°C wash water
title.zh: 制造：涂装废气余热提升至 70°C 清洗热水

excerpt.en: Illustrative low-lift heat pump recovering booth exhaust to supply parts wash water.
excerpt.zh: 示意案例：低温升热泵回收涂装废气热量，供应零件清洗热水。

heatSource.zh: 过滤后涂装废气当量约 28–35°C

technology.en: Air-to-water heat pump + glycol recovery coil
technology.zh: 空气—水热泵 + 乙二醇回收盘管

result.en: Illustrative strong ROI on two-shift booth runtime
result.zh: 示意双班涂装时回收期更优

background.en: An automotive supplier exhausted warm booth air while purchasing electric or gas heat for wash lines.
background.zh: 汽车零部件供应商排放温热涂装废气，同时又用电或燃气加热清洗线。

inputs.en: Source: filtered exhaust air ~28–35°C equivalent. Sink: wash water 65–70°C. Duty: ~350 kW.
inputs.zh: 热源：过滤后废气当量约 28–35°C。热汇：清洗水 65–70°C。负荷约 350 kW。

solution.en: Air-to-water heat pump with glycol coil recovery and fouling-tolerant exchangers; weekend setback strategy.
solution.zh: 空气—水热泵 + 乙二醇盘管回收与耐污换热器；周末低负荷策略。

performance.en: Illustrative COP 3.0–3.6; strong when booth runs two shifts.
performance.zh: 示意 COP 约 3.0–3.6；双班涂装时效益更明显。

roi.en: Payback often <4 years where electricity is competitive and booth runtime is high.
roi.zh: 在电价有竞争力且涂装高运行时，回收期常小于 4 年。

a.en: Recovery coils need filtration and cleanable design; heat pump refrigerant circuit stays sealed from booth air.
a.zh: 回收盘管需过滤与可清洗设计；热泵制冷剂回路与涂装空气隔离密封。
